title: Red (disambiguation)
content:
'''Red''' can refer to the [[Color/Legends|color]] [[Wikipedia:Red|red]], or any of the following:

[[File:Sith_Lightsaber.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Sith lightsaber/Legends|Sith lightsabers]] often produced red blades.]]
